The Nature Conservancy. Hosted on Course

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

PepsiCo and ASU continued their collaboration to advance global water stewardship education through the Water Security and Stewardship program, originally developed in partnership with The Nature Conservancy. Hosted on Coursera, the program equips professionals with practical strategies for addre...
